transmutate.name: Transmutate
transmutate.desc: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Psychic-type moves and have their power multiplied by 1.2. This effect comes after other effects that change a move's type.
transmutate.shortDesc: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Psychic type and have 1.2x power.

chaosemeralds.name: Chaos Emeralds
chaosemeralds.shortDesc: When Sonic reaches 1 HP, fully heal and transform into Super Sonic.
